name: Spring Rock Golf Center
address: 377 Denton Ave, New Hyde Park, NY 11040
about: Spring Rock Golf Center offers a comprehensive golf experience in New Hyde Park, New York, featuring a driving range, miniature golf, indoor PGA simulators, and professional lessons. The venue is equipped with top-tier facilities, including a 250-yard in-depth driving range with 100 covered booths, multiple 18-hole miniature golf courses, and indoor golf technology that replicates PGA games. Patrons can enjoy a practice putting green and sand traps, on-site repairs, and amenities like a snack bar. The facility is open daily from 7:00 AM to 11:00 PM and is designed for both casual players and serious golfers looking to improve their skills.
why_golfers_like_it: Top 50 golf ranges in America with premium facilities
Indoor simulators replicating PGA games for realistic play
Convenient amenities like heaters, fans, and a snack bar
Variety of miniature golf courses for family fun

food_and_drink.notes: On-site snack bar serving hot & cold drinks and snacks
No mention of alcohol service on-site

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available, with the last rental time at 8:00 PM.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not mentioned; the venue has an on-site snack bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time for 18 holes is not specified, but the venue offers multiple 18-hole miniature golf courses.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Spring Rock offers miniature golf and party plans, making it suitable for families and kids.
